sentence: 她在大学主修生物分类学。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué zhǔxiū shēngwù fēnlèixué.
english: She majored in biological taxonomy at university.

sentence: 周末他喜欢去山林里散步，呼吸新鲜空气。
pinyin: Zhōu mò tā xǐ huān qù shān lín lǐ sàn bù, hū xī xīn xiān kōng qì.
english: On weekends he likes to walk in the mountain forest and breathe fresh air.

sentence: 他是个鬼才，总能想出别人想不到的点子。
pinyin: Tā shì gè guǐ cái, zǒng néng xiǎng chū bié rén xiǎng bù dào de diǎn zi.
english: He's a creative genius who always comes up with ideas nobody else thinks of.

meaning: to produce (graduates, breast milk, toxic waste, creative ideas etc);
sentence: 这台机器每天的产出是一千个零件。
pinyin: Zhè tái jī qì měi tiān de chǎn chū shì yī qiān gè líng jiàn.
english: This machine's daily output is one thousand parts.

sentence: 他毕业后进入银行业，现在是一家银行的经理。
pinyin: Tā bì yè hòu jìn rù yín háng yè, xiàn zài shì yī jiā yín háng de jīng lǐ.
english: After graduating he entered banking and is now a manager at a bank.
